## Summary

Describe the protocol change or documentation update.

## Compatibility

Does this change affect existing v0.1 draft implementations?

```text
No compatibility impact / Clarification only / Breaking change
```

## Checklist

- [ ] The change keeps humans as relationship owners.
- [ ] Sender-mode visibility is preserved.
- [ ] Agent permissions and approvals remain explicit.
- [ ] Examples or schemas were updated if the payload changed.
